Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 18,2002.
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on Petition approvimg Compromise of Minor's Claim. Petitioner present with minor and represented by and through her counsel, Jeffrey, S. Mitchell, Esq. Good cause appearing, the Court grants the petition approving claim as follows: Compromise: $300,000.00; $36,000.00 as Reimbursement of medical to Mr. Rouda; $27,645.92 Emotional Distress to Mr. Rouds; Costs: $2,359.95; Reserve Costs: $1,000.00 and the Net Balance of $230,000.00 in Deferred Annunity set up simultaneously with a Blocked Account with no withdrawals until the minor has attained the age of 18. Any withdrawals should be upon Court Order.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2002 Set For Trial On Dec-09-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-20-02 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 502
